tributes.name: Eugin Muse
tributes.message:
Today, I stand with a heavy heart, but also with a thankful heart, as I remember my grandmother, the woman who raised me, shaped me, and loved me unconditionally. She was more than a grandmother to me; she was my parent, my protector, my teacher, and my greatest source of strength. Life was not always easy, but she never let me feel the weight of it.  She reminded me of hope, sacrificed so much so that I could have a  better life, and everything I am today is because of her.
Losing her is one of the hardest things I have ever faced, but I find comfort in knowing that her love, her lessons, and her spirit live on in me. She taught me to keep going, to stay strong, and to always choose kindness no matter the circumstances. I carry her with me in everything I do, and I will spend my life trying to honor the love and sacrifices she gave to me freely. Rest in peace, Grandma,you will always be in my heart.

tributes.name: Merciline   Kutoyi
tributes.message:
Dear shosh,
You were the heart of our family,a source of love, wisdom and comfort. Your gentle presence made every  moment special,and your love will remain with us forever. Though we say goodbye with heavy hearts ,we are grateful for the beautiful memories you leave behind,  Rest peacefully.

tributes.name: Benedict Mulaa
tributes.message: Rest easy Kukhu.Your legacy lives on forever.Your kindness and love will never be forgotten.May your soul rest in power.

tributes.name: Kevin Kutoyi
tributes.message: Kukhuu, you were kindness in human form i.e loving, gentle, and full of stories that shaped who we are. Your wisdom lives on in every lesson you shared with us, and your love will forever guide us. Rest peacefully.
